titleStmt.title: SII 36.201: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 201. (A.R. No. 201 of 1910.) ADHAMANKŌṬṬAI (Adhiyamāṉkōṭṭai), DHARMAPURI TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT. On the north and west bases of the Bhairava temple.

p.hi: Narasiṅga II. Year 17: Kali 4386, Śaka 1[1]57 = A.D. 1235.

summary.p: Records the grant of three pieces of land at Nandimaṅgalam as a temple kāṇi to Viḍukādar, the son of Śaivāchāri Periyadēvar by Paramaya-Charakaṇi who built the temple of Paramēśvaramuḍaiyār at Mahēndramaṅgalam from basement to finial and consecrated it. Of the three pieces of land, one was a garden land and the other two pieces have a sowing capacity of 18 and 3 kaṇḍukas each.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kaliyuka varu[ṣam] 133 10 6 śaka varuṣam 115 10 7 vīranāraciṅka tevaṉukku yāṇṭu 10 7 Āvatu manmahā pradhāni paramaviśvāsi daṇḍinakopa jabhadoppa kaṇṭaṉ mātava taṇṇākkaṉ pradhāṉaṉ koṅkarmār paramaya carakaṇiyeṉ mahendramaṅkalattu nāṉ(āṉ) pratiṣṭai paṇṇiṉa nāyaṉār parameśvaramuṭaiyārukkut tirukkoyil Upānādisthupyantamākac ceytu Inta nāyaṉārukku nantimaṅkalattilum nāṉ Iṭṭa maṭattuk kaṭṭukkūliyāka nāṉ peṟṟuṭaiya nīrnilam melait tūmpil mutal maṭaiyil patiṉaiṅ kaṇṭaka vitaiyum
Ivverikku kīḻarukiṟ koyil nāyaṉār Eḻuntaruḷi Irukkiṟa toṭṭanilam nāṟpālellaiyum It toṭṭattukkuk kīḻaruke mukkaṇṭaka vitai kaḻaṉiyum tiruccūlasthāpaṉam paṇṇa śaivvācāriyap periya tevar makaṉ viṭukātaṟkku Ikkoyil kāṇiyāka nīrvārttuk kuṭuttu Iddharmmam candrādittavarai celvatāka kuṭutteṉ paramey carakaṇiyeṉ It taṉmattai vilakkināruṇṭākil kaṅkaik karaiyiṟ kurāṟ pacuvaik koṉṟāṉ pāvaṅ koḷvāṉ vallavaraiyaṉ cattiyam
Digital edition of SII 36.201 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
